segments.text:
Now this is what the LORD says—He who created you, O Jacob,
and He who formed you, O Israel:
Do not fear, for I have redeemed you; I have called you by your name; you are Mine!
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
When you pass through the waters, I will be with you; and when you go through the rivers, they will not overwhelm you. When you walk through the fire, you will not be scorched; 
the flames will not set you ablaze.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: For I am the LORD your God, the Holy One of Israel, your Savior; I give Egypt for your ransom, Cush[^152] and Seba in your place.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Because you are precious and honored in My sight, and because I love you, I will give men in exchange for you and nations in place of your life.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
Do not be afraid, for I am with you; I will bring your offspring from the east
and gather you from the west.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: I will say to the north, ‘Give them up!’and to the south, ‘Do not hold them back!’Bring My sons from afar, and My daughters from the ends of the earth—
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: everyone called by My name and created for My glory, whom I have indeed formed and made.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Bring out a people who have eyes but are blind, and who have ears but are deaf.

All the nations gather together and the peoples assemble. Who among them can declare this, and proclaim to us the former things? Let them present their witnesses to vindicate them, so that others may hear and say,
It is true.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: You are My witnesses,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: declares the LORD,
and My servant whom I have chosen, so that you may consider and believe Me and understand that I am He. Before Me no god was formed, and after Me none will come.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: I, yes I, am the LORD, and there is no Savior but Me.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: I alone decreed and saved and proclaimed—I, and not some foreign god among you. So you are My witnesses,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: declares the LORD,
that I am God.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
Even from eternity I am He, and none can deliver out of My hand. 
When I act, who can reverse it?
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Thus says the LORD your Redeemer, the Holy One of Israel:
For your sake, I will send to Babylon and bring them all as fugitives, even the Chaldeans, [^153] in the ships in which they rejoice.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: I am the LORD, your Holy One, the Creator of Israel, and your King.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Thus says the LORD, who makes a way in the sea and a path through the surging waters,
who brings out the chariots and horses, the armies and warriors together, to lie down, never to rise again; to be extinguished, snuffed out like a wick:
Do not call to mind the former things; pay no attention to the things of old.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Behold, I am about to do something new; even now it is coming. Do you not see it? Indeed, I will make a way in the wilderness and streams in the desert.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
The beasts of the field will honor Me, the jackals[^154] and the ostriches, [^155] because I provide water in the wilderness and rivers in the desert, 
to give drink to My chosen people.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
The people I formed for Myselfwill declare My praise. 

## Israel’s Unfaithfulness
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: But you have not called on Me, O Jacob, because you have grown weary of Me, O Israel.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: You have not brought Me sheep for burnt offerings, nor honored Me with your sacrifices. I have not burdened you with offerings, nor wearied you with frankincense.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: You have not bought Me sweet cane with your silver, nor satisfied Me with the fat of your sacrifices. But you have burdened Me with your sins; you have wearied Me with your iniquities.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
I, yes I, am He who blots out your transgressions for My own sake
and remembers your sins no more.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Remind Me, let us argue the matter together. State your case, so that you may be vindicated.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Your first father sinned, and your spokesmen rebelled against Me.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: So I will disgrace the princes of your sanctuary, and I will devote Jacob to destruction[^156] and Israel to reproach.
segments.speaker: the Lord
